specializations: Silicone-based sensory modifiers and film formers
Silicone elastomers for cushiony skin feel
Long-wear performance ingredients for color cosmetics
product_highlights: DOWSIL™ silicone range — comprehensive sensory modification solutions
XIAMETER® silicones — performance silicones for personal care
Silicone elastomers delivering unique cushiony skin feel
Naturally derived alternatives for sustainable formulations
notes: Dow is one of the world's largest materials science companies with a comprehensive portfolio of silicone-based ingredients for personal care. Their DOWSIL™ and XIAMETER® silicone ranges include film formers, sensory modifiers, and emollients used in virtually every category of personal care product. Dow's silicone elastomers are particularly valued for their ability to deliver a unique, cushiony skin feel and improve the spreadability of formulations.
